content:
Hey, trying to make a community tool for new players to reference, so that they can find what D-tide comps they can make based on the units that they have. Spent an hour or so prototyping. I haven't been able to find a way to get up to date D-tide leaderboard information without manually clicking through each player on the leaderboards, selecting each wave, and clicking "copy lineup info". 

So, I think it'll be a limitation that players will have to manually paste in the comps that they know will work, or the community will need to compile a list. I've added a feature to batch-import, but it still feels clunky. I was wondering if the Morimens devs would be willing to open a API endpoint to fetch information about the people on the d-tide leaderboard, and their compositions for each wave. Or, if there is a chinese database for this already that we are not aware of. 

P.S. Additionally, the copy lineup information is a bit barebones, and only includes awakener name, wheel1 name, wheel2 name, and convenant. Are there plans to expand on this? It would be great if #epiphany is also available for wheels and characters. 

```
@@o8xbn2ypyfyCx6ygxHSxp6gNKxCxAxXIWxwxbytkysyDHxmZxOixKrxgd@@Investigation Lineup
Keeper: xxx（xxx） Team: -

Karen, Duty's Gravitas, Sail of Providence, Re-evolution
Tawil, Eternal Requiem, Wheel Unseen, Dream of Medicine
Ryker, Hour of Fortune, Fate Roulette, Burial Ground's Sighs
Lotan, Whisper, Punishment, Burial Ground's Sighs

@@mXWk5fxXxVxJx3xnxtxlSx5xZxT7ZxOixKrxgxAxXIWxwxbxAxXIWxwxbH@@
```
